classes.label: Staff
classes.description: A person employed by the organization.
evidence: Records describe staff movements, leaves, retirements, and re-employment.

classes.label: Department
classes.description: An organizational unit within the institution.
evidence: 组织内调入 部门号: 组织内部调动后现院系所部中心号

classes.label: Sick Leave
classes.description: A period of absence due to illness.
evidence: Records track sick leave start, diagnosis, recovery, and related hospitals.

classes.label: Hospital
classes.description: A medical institution providing diagnosis or treatment.
evidence: 病休诊断医院: 病休诊断的医院名称
康复诊断医院: 进行康复诊断的医院名称

classes.label: Medical Certificate
classes.description: An official document issued by a hospital confirming a medical condition.
evidence: 病休诊断证明: 医院开据的病休诊断证明
康复诊断证明: 医院开具的康复诊断证明

classes.label: Retirement
classes.description: The status or process of leaving employment due to age or service.
evidence: Records describe retirement dates, benefits, and management units.

classes.label: Re-employment
evidence: 返聘起始日期: 离退休后被重新聘任工作的起始日期

classes.label: Funding
classes.description: Financial allocations or funds received by the organization.
evidence: 教育事业费拨款: 单位：元
其他拨款: 单位：元

datatype_properties.label: Transfer Department ID
datatype_properties.description: The department number after an internal transfer.
evidence: 组织内调入 部门号: 组织内部调动后现院系所部中心号

datatype_properties.label: Salary Transfer Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of personal salary and labor transfer.
evidence: 工资转移日期: 个人劳资转移日期

datatype_properties.label: Document File Number
datatype_properties.description: The file number related to personal changes.
evidence: 文书档案号: 跟个人变动有关的文件档案编号

datatype_properties.label: Leave Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of leaving the post.
evidence: 离岗日期

datatype_properties.label: Leave Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of leaving the post.
evidence: 离岗原因码

datatype_properties.label: Return to Work Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of returning to the job position.
evidence: 返岗日期: 返回工作岗位的日期

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The start date of sick leave.
evidence: 病休起始日期: 因病休假的起始日期

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Diagnosis Hospital
datatype_properties.description: Name of the hospital that diagnosed the sick leave.
evidence: 病休诊断医院: 病休诊断的医院名称

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Certificate
datatype_properties.description: The sick leave diagnosis certificate issued by the hospital.
evidence: 病休诊断证明: 医院开据的病休诊断证明

datatype_properties.label: Recovery Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of returning to work after sick leave.
evidence: 恢复工作日期: 病休恢复工作的日期

datatype_properties.label: Recovery Diagnosis Hospital
datatype_properties.description: Name of the hospital that performed the recovery diagnosis.
evidence: 康复诊断医院: 进行康复诊断的医院名称

datatype_properties.label: Recovery Certificate
datatype_properties.description: The recovery diagnosis certificate issued by the hospital.
evidence: 康复诊断证明: 医院开具的康复诊断证明

datatype_properties.label: Resignation Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of leaving the organization.
evidence: 离职日期: 离开本单位的日期

datatype_properties.label: Resignation Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of resignation.
evidence: 离职原因码

datatype_properties.label: Resignation Destination
datatype_properties.description: The destination after leaving the organization.
evidence: 离职去向: 离开本单位工作岗位后的去向

datatype_properties.label: Retirement Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of retirement.
evidence: 离退类别码

datatype_properties.label: Retirement Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The retirement date approved by the organization or HR department.
evidence: 离退起始日期: 由组织、人事部门批准的离退休日期

datatype_properties.label: Post Retirement Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the level enjoyed after retirement.
evidence: 离退后享受级别码

datatype_properties.label: Pension Payment Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit that pays the retirement pension.
evidence: 离退休费支付单位: 离退休后，支付离退休费的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Post Retirement Management Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the specific management unit after retirement.
evidence: 离退后管理单位: 离退后的具体管理单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Remote Settlement Location
datatype_properties.description: The location where the retiree is settled for living.
evidence: 异地安置地点: 离退后安置到异地生活的地点

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The start date of re-employment after retirement.
evidence: 返聘起始日期: 离退休后被重新聘任工作的起始日期

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment End Date
datatype_properties.description: The end date of re-employment after retirement.
evidence: 返聘终止日期: 离退休后被重新聘任工作的终止日期

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Unit ID
datatype_properties.description: The ID of the re-employment work unit, self-compiled by the school.
evidence: 返聘单位号: 重新聘任的工作单位号，学校自编

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Position
datatype_properties.description: The re-employment work position.
evidence: 返聘岗位: 重新聘任的工作岗位

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Remuneration
datatype_properties.description: The labor remuneration for re-employment, unit: Yuan/month.
evidence: 返聘酬金: 重新聘任工作的劳动报酬，单位：元/月

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Funding Source
datatype_properties.description: The funding source for re-employment.
evidence: 返聘金来源: 返聘资金的经费来源

datatype_properties.label: Re-employment Workload
datatype_properties.description: The workload for re-employment, unit: hours/month.
evidence: 返聘工作量: 单位：小时/月

datatype_properties.label: Education Fund Appropriation
datatype_properties.description: Education fund appropriation, unit: Yuan.
evidence: 教育事业费拨款: 单位：元

datatype_properties.label: Other Appropriation
datatype_properties.description: Other appropriations, unit: Yuan.
evidence: 其他拨款: 单位：元

object_properties.label: transferred to department
object_properties.description: The department a staff member is transferred to.
evidence: 组织内调入 部门号: 组织内部调动后现院系所部中心号

object_properties.label: has sick leave
object_properties.description: The sick leave record associated with a staff member.
evidence: Records track sick leave start, diagnosis, recovery, and related hospitals.

object_properties.label: diagnosed by hospital
object_properties.description: The hospital that provided the diagnosis for the sick leave.
evidence: 病休诊断医院: 病休诊断的医院名称
康复诊断医院: 进行康复诊断的医院名称

object_properties.label: has certificate
object_properties.description: The medical certificate associated with the sick leave.
evidence: 病休诊断证明: 医院开据的病休诊断证明
康复诊断证明: 医院开具的康复诊断证明

object_properties.label: has retirement
object_properties.description: The retirement record associated with a staff member.
evidence: Records describe retirement dates, benefits, and management units.

object_properties.label: managed by unit
object_properties.description: The unit responsible for managing the retiree.
evidence: 离退后管理单位: 离退后的具体管理单位名称

object_properties.label: has re-employment
object_properties.description: The re-employment record associated with a staff member.
evidence: 返聘起始日期: 离退休后被重新聘任工作的起始日期

object_properties.label: re-employed by unit
object_properties.description: The unit that re-employed the staff member.
evidence: 返聘单位号: 重新聘任的工作单位号，学校自编
